name: chat
context: Chat completions — send messages, stream responses, manage conversations
info: Create chat completions with GPT-4o, GPT-4, or GPT-3.5. Supports streaming, function calling, JSON mode, system prompts, and multi-turn conversations. Handles token counting and context window management.

scripts.name: Chat Completion
scripts.description: Send messages and get a completion response

scripts.name: Streaming Completion
scripts.description: Stream a chat completion token by token
